name: Chocolate Truffle Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups reduced fat Oreo® cookie crumbs
3 ounces unsweetened baking chocolate squares, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions: To prepare crust, combine crumbs, margarine, and sugar in a mixing bowl. Press mixture firmly into a 9-inch pie pan. Spread crumb mixture evenly in the pan. Chill for 1 hour, or until firm. Alternatively, bake at 375°F for 10 minutes, or until edges are brown. Cool on a rack before filling. To prepare filling, combine gelatin and water in a saucepan. Let stand for one minute. Over low heat, stir until gelatin is completely dissolved. Cool. In a mixing bowl, combine chocolate, sweetened condensed milk, gelatin mixture, and vanilla extract. Mix well. Fold in whipped topping. Pour into crust. Chill for three hours or until set.
